summary: Oracle has been actively acquiring companies in the cloud space, posing a threat to SAP's market share.
Workday has made some recent announcements, but it remains to be seen if they will impact SAP significantly.
Salesforce's recent focus on AI and machine learning could potentially challenge SAP in the market.
Microsoft has been aggressively expanding its cloud offerings, making it a major competitor to SAP.
